html:
Exclusive to:

“Attracts a school of fish when thrown into the ocean.”

-

The Fish Food is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It can be obtained from the level 8 Crabby Hermit in exchange for 1 Empty Bottle.

Player can also use 5 Empty Bottles to trade Fish Food Blueprint with the level 8 Crabby Hermit. It requires 2 Rots, 3 Barnacles and 1 Silk to craft 1 Fish Food.

Fish food can be thrown into the Ocean to attract nearby all Ocean Fishes and other ocean creatures that eat eat meat type food and create new temporary schools of fish if there are not too many fish nearby. This effect lasts 20 seconds.

When thrown, similiar to the Napsack, it creates a cloud.

Trivia

  • Fish Food was introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.
  • Fish Food originally cost 3 empty bottles, this was reduced to 1 in the The Curse of Moon Quay update.
  • Fish Food Blueprint was added in the Staying Afloat update.
  • Fish Food is a chum - type of food, specifically ground-up fish used as bait

“It's a fish meal!”
–Wilson
“Ew, fish eat that nasty stuff?”
–Willow
“Eat, fish! Is good for you!”
–Wolfgang
“I had a pet fish once... it didn't last very long.”
–Wendy
“HA! PITIFUL ORGANICS, THE FOOD IS A TRAP”
–WX-78
“I find it best not to dwell on what it's made of.”
–Wickerbottom
“Smells bad, but the fish love it.”
–Woodie
“Say, that chum doesn't look so good.”
–Maxwell
“A banquet för the sea beasties!”
–Wigfrid
“We like feeding the fish!”
–Webber
“I suppose fish don't have an especially sophisticated palate.”
–Warly
“Glub Glub belly stuff”
–Wormwood
“I'm all for anything that makes fishing go faster.”
–Winona
“Shall we try to get chummy with the fish? Hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Eat up, fishies!”
–Wurt
“You use it to lure the fish in.”
–Walter
“It's only fair to feed the fish before they feed me.”
–Wanda
“Attracts a school of fish when thrown into the ocean.”
-
The Fish Food is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It can be obtained from the level 8 Crabby Hermit in exchange for 1 Empty Bottle.
Player can also use 5 Empty Bottles to trade Fish Food Blueprint with the level 8 Crabby Hermit. It requires 2 Rots, 3 Barnacles and 1 Silk to craft 1 Fish Food.
Fish food can be thrown into the Ocean to attract nearby all Ocean Fishes and other ocean creatures that eat eat meat type food and create new temporary schools of fish if there are not too many fish nearby. This effect lasts 20 seconds.
When thrown, similiar to the Napsack, it creates a cloud.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Fish Food was introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.
Fish Food originally cost 3 empty bottles, this was reduced to 1 in the The Curse of Moon Quay update.
Fish Food Blueprint was added in the Staying Afloat update.
Fish Food is a chum - type of food, specifically ground-up fish used as bait

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thức ăn cho Cá là một Vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó có thể được lấy từ Crabby Hermit cấp 8 để đổi lấy 1 Chai Rỗng.

The '''Fish Food''' is an [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It can be obtained from the level 8 [[Crabby Hermit]] in exchange for 1 [[Empty Bottle#Don't Starve Together|Empty Bottle]].

Player can also use 5 Empty Bottles to trade Fish Food Blueprint with the level 8 Crabby Hermit. It requires 2 [[Rot]]s, 3 [[Barnacles]] and 1 [[Silk]] to craft 1 Fish Food.

Fish food can be thrown into the [[Ocean]] to attract nearby all [[Ocean Fishes]] and other ocean creatures that eat [[Food Type/DST#Meat|eat meat type food]] and create new temporary schools of fish if there are not too many fish nearby. This effect lasts 20 seconds.

When thrown, similiar to the [[Napsack]], it creates a cloud.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Fish Food was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#She Sells Sea Shells|She Sells Sea Shells]]'' update.
* Fish Food originally cost 3 empty bottles, this was reduced to 1 in the ''[[The Curse of Moon Quay]]'' update.
* Fish Food Blueprint was added in the  ''[[From_Beyond#Staying_Afloat|Staying Afloat]]'' update.
* Fish Food is a chum - type of food, specifically ground-up fish used as bait
